simulation_notes: Real daily OHLCV from Yahoo Finance. Sector ETFs (XLK, XLV, XLF, XLE, XLI, XLY, XLP, XLB, XLC, XLU, XLRE) included for rotation strategy. Position caps enforced per strategy; signals ranked by quality. Momentum & sector rotation use monthly rebalancing with stop-loss protection.

pead.name: 3-Month Momentum
pead.description: Always-deployed: long top-5 universe stocks by trailing 3-month return. Monthly rebalance, equal-weight $5,000 each. Captures medium-horizon momentum leaders. −10% stop per position.

mom6.name: 6-Month Momentum
mom6.description: Always-deployed: long top-10 universe stocks by trailing 6-month return. Monthly rebalance, equal-weight $2,500 each. Jegadeesh & Titman (1993) momentum factor. −15% stop per position.

breakout.name: 1-Month Momentum
breakout.description: Always-deployed: long top-3 universe stocks by trailing 21-day return. Bi-weekly rebalance, equal-weight $5,000 each. Captures short-horizon momentum leaders. −8% stop per position.

sector_rot.name: Sector ETF Rotation
sector_rot.description: Monthly rebalance: long top-3 of 11 SPDR sector ETFs by 60-day return. Rotates capital into the strongest sectors; avoids laggards. −8% stop per sector position.

insider.name: Insider Accumulation
insider.description: Uptrend (above SMA20) with controlled 2–7% pullback on quiet volume. Mimics institutional accumulation — buying the dip in strong stocks. +18% target / −7% stop (45-day hold).
